title: Talk Like TED
author: Carmine Gallo
subline: The 9 public-speaking secrets of the world's top minds.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A TED-style stage viewed from the audience: a single red circle of light on a dark stage floor, a person silhouette standing in it, a single beam of light from above. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1240)" fill="none">
    <!-- Stage floor: a thin trapezoid (perspective) -->
    <path d="M -1100 400 L 1100 400 L 1300 600 L -1300 600 Z" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <!-- The red carpet (oval spotlight on the floor) -->
    <ellipse cx="0" cy="500" rx="380" ry="60" fill="#fc1c46" opacity="0.25"/>
    <ellipse cx="0" cy="500" rx="380" ry="60" fill="none" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="2"/>
    <!-- The beam of light from above (cone shape) -->
    <path d="M -200 -600 L 200 -600 L 380 500 L -380 500 Z" fill="#fc1c46" opacity="0.08"/>
    <path d="M -200 -600 L 200 -600 L 380 500 L -380 500 Z" fill="none" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="2 5"/>
    <!-- The light source (a small red dot at the top of the beam) -->
    <circle cx="0" cy="-620" r="10" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <!-- The person silhouette on stage -->
    <g stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="3" fill="none">
      <circle cx="0" cy="320" r="32"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="352" x2="0" y2="480"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="380" x2="-50" y2="430"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="380" x2="50" y2="380"/>
    </g>
    <!-- The 'mic stand' (a hairline) -->
    <line x1="60" y1="360" x2="60" y2="500" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <circle cx="60" cy="360" r="4" fill="#cccccc"/>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: A TED talk IS a stage. The cover is a stage view: a hairline trapezoid stage floor, a single RED spotlight ellipse on the floor where the speaker stands, a faint red cone of light from above, and a white stick-figure speaker at the center. The light source dot is red. Title sits overlaid in the middle, weight 500 command, UPPERCASE. Brand 'STAGE' in the top-left; pill '18 MIN' at the top — TED's actual time limit. The book is a manual for the person in the spotlight.
